     8	function parseDls(dls: string): Record<string, string> {
     9	  const result: Record<string, string> = {}
    10	  for (const line of dls.split('\n')) {
    11	    const idx = line.indexOf('=')
    12	    if (idx > 0) {
    13	      const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim()
    14	      const value = line.slice(idx + 1).trim()
    15	      if (key && value) {
    16	        result[key] = value
    17	      }
    18	    }
    19	  }
    20	  return result
    21	}
    22	
    23	export function ComponentRenderer({ dls, shadow }: ComponentRendererProps) {
    24	  const parsed = parseDls(dls)
    25	  const source = parsed['import'] || '(none)'
    26	  const name = parsed['name'] || '(unnamed)'
    27	  const height = parsed['height'] || 'auto'
    28	
    29	  return (
    30	    <div className="rich-component-block">
    31	      <div
    32	        style={{
    33	          padding: '12px 16px',

    28	
    29	export function RichEditor({
    30	  initialValue,
    31	  onChange,
    32	  variant = 'article',

    34	  placeholder = 'Write something...',
    35	  onSubmit,

    44	  children,
    45	}: RichEditorProps) {
    46	  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    47	  const initialConfig = {
    48	    namespace: 'RichEditor',
    49	    theme: editorTheme,
    50	    nodes,
    51	    editable: true,
    52	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    53	      console.error('[RichEditor]', error)

    57

    59	
    60	  return (

    62	      <RendererConfigProvider config={rendererConfig}>
    63	        <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    64	          <div className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}>
    65	            <RichTextPlugin
    66	              contentEditable={
    67	                <ContentEditable
    68	                  className={contentClassName}
    69	                  placeholder={placeholder}
    70	                />
    71	              }

    74	            <HistoryPlugin />

    78	            <TablePlugin />
    79	            <MarkdownShortcutsPlugin />

    81	            <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />
    82	            <ImagePlugin />
    83	            <KaTeXPlugin />
    84	            <AlertPlugin />
    85	            <MermaidPlugin />
    86	            <ComponentPlugin />

    43	        setLoading(false)
    44	      })
    45	  }, [])
    46	
    47	  if (loading) {
    48	    return <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>

    94	      } catch {
    95	        // ignore serialization errors
    96	      }
    97	    },
    98	    [onSnapshotChange],
    99	  )

    21	
    22	export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    23	  __snapshot: string

    25	  static getType(): string {
    26	    return 'tldraw'
    27	  }
    28	
    29	  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {

    32	
    33	  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    34	    super(key)
    35	    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    36	  }
    37

    54	  }
    55	
    56	  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    57	    return {
    58	      ...super.exportJSON(),
    59	      type: 'tldraw',
    60	      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    61	      version: 1,
    62	    }

     1	import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2	import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
     3	import { useEffect } from 'react'

     5	import { $createTldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
     6	
     7	export const INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND = createCommand<string>('INSERT_TLDRAW')
     8	
     9	export function TldrawPlugin() {
    10	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    11	
    12	  useEffect(() => {
    13	    return editor.registerCommand(
    14	      INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND,
    15	      (snapshot) => {

    19	      },
    20	      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    21	    )
    22	  }, [editor])
    23	
    24	  return null
    25	}

    39	export function RendererWrapper({

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-12 09:01:34Z)**_

1. [MEDIUM] Remote component descriptors are now enabled by default, File: `packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts:60`, Issue: `ComponentNode` is globally registered and `ComponentPlugin` is always mounted (`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx:86`) while `dls` remains free-form. If an app supplies a custom `RendererConfig.Component` that fetches/executes remote scripts, untrusted document content can become a stored script-execution/XSS vector, Fix: make component support opt-in (feature flag or `extraNodes` only), validate `dls` schema at insert/import time, and enforce HTTPS + origin allowlist.

2. [MEDIUM] `extraNodes` merging can cause duplicate node registration crashes, File: `packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx:25`, Issue: `nodes` is built via array concat without deduplication. If consumers pass nodes already present in `allNodes` (now more likely with newly exported nodes), Lexical can fail on duplicate type registration, Fix: dedupe by `node.getType()` before composing `initialConfig.nodes` and optionally warn on duplicates.

3. [LOW] New public API/runtime behavior lacks accompanying tests, File: `packages/rich-editor/src/types.ts:29`, Issue: this diff adds `children` support in `RichEditor`, `extraNodes` in `RichRenderer`, default `ComponentPlugin` wiring, and new exports, but no tests were added to lock behavior and prevent regressions, Fix: add integration tests for editor/renderer with extra nodes, plugin children mounting, and component-node serialize/deserialize/render flows.

4. [LOW] Dependency attack surface increased significantly (with deprecated transitive package), File: `pnpm-lock.yaml:5941`, Issue: introducing `tldraw` (`packages/rich-editor-demo/package.json:37`) pulls a large transitive tree and includes deprecated `lodash.isequal@4.5.0`; no audit/bundle guard is visible in this diff, Fix: run and gate on dependency audit + bundle-size checks in CI, and constrain/override risky transitive dependencies where possible.

5. [LOW] Type-safety is bypassed in new fixture nodes, File: `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/node-samples.ts:556`, Issue: new `component`/`tldraw` examples use `as any` (also in `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/presets.ts:70` and `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/presets.ts:355`), which hides schema/type mistakes and weakens maintainability, Fix: add typed helper constructors/interfaces for these node payloads instead of `as any`.

No hardcoded credentials, CSRF/auth bypass, or path traversal issues were evident in the provided diff.

Verdict: WARNING
